title: デビュー戦の後に・次はデッカく！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka is relieved to have her skill validated after
a successful debut. With that momentum, she
declares that she will run in a G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Drawn in by how cool the name looks, Vodka
decides to run in the Hanshin J.F. next.
